---
title: "Pandorha Engine - AI Context Map"
version: "2.1.0"
stack: "Svelte 5 (Runes), Drizzle ORM, SQLite WASM, Web Workers, Vite"
conventions: "Feature-Sliced Design (4 camadas), Strict TDD, Custom RPC Bridge"
maintenance_protocol: "Hybrid (Agent suggests LLMS_DIFF, Human approves)"
updated: "2026-06-11"
---

# 🗺️ PANDORHA ENGINE: AI ROOT MAP

> **PRIME DIRECTIVE:** Follow the language contract below, use Svelte 5 Runes strictly, keep Main/Worker communication on the custom RPC bridge (`src/shared/rpc/`), and NEVER throw errors from service methods.
>
> **LANGUAGE CONTRACT:** Use Brazilian Portuguese (`pt-BR`) for every user-facing artifact: chat responses, UI copy, product documentation, lore, RPG/business rules, acceptance criteria, and human-readable reports. Use English for Codex/AI-facing technical artifacts: identifiers, APIs, module and file names when idiomatic, implementation contracts, technical comments, tests, and agent operating instructions. When an artifact has both audiences, keep the user-facing layer in `pt-BR` and the implementation layer in English.

> **TASK INTAKE CONTRACT:** Before every new feature or modification, the agent must inspect the relevant project context, decide the best implementation strategy, and report the execution profile to the user before changing files. The report must state: recommended model and reasoning effort, whether Plan mode should be enabled, whether IDE context should be used, which plugins/skills/MCPs are required, and which project commands, configuration files, and validation tools will be used. If the task is small and safe, this report may be concise; if the task is broad, architectural, or touches RPG rules/database behavior, it must be explicit and wait for user approval when required by `AGENTS.md`.

> **TOOLING RELEVANCE CONTRACT:** Before every task, inspect available plugins, skills, MCPs, scripts, and auxiliary resources. Report useful tools in pt-BR using `Vou usar agora`, `Úteis, mas fora do escopo`, and `Não usadas e motivo`. Include one concrete reason per listed tool and avoid full inventories. Use `docs/conventions/tooling-relevance-map.md` as the canonical map.

> **MANDATORY PLANNING CONTRACT:** The agent must create a detailed, repository-specific implementation plan before coding any new feature, implementation, or meaningful modification. The agent must not write code that violates project specifications. If a task appears to require an unplanned design pattern, convention, skill, MCP, plugin, automation, tool, function, method, dependency, or workflow, the agent must stop, explain the need, present multiple options with pros and cons, recommend the best option for Pandorha Engine, and ask the user how to proceed before adopting it.

## 🧠 PROTOCOLO DE RACIOCÍNIO (Thinking Mode)
**[CRÍTICO]** Para qualquer tarefa que envolva alteração no motor de regras, atributos globais ou banco de dados:
O agente **DEVE** abrir um bloco `<thought>` interno para validar a mudança proposta cruzando os dados com o `blueprint.md` e as `core-conventions.md` **antes** de gerar qualquer código.
**Ação mandatória:** O agente é expressamente instruído a **REJEITAR** pedidos ou implementações que violem a integridade dos Eixos 3x3 do sistema Pandorha, bem como sua lógica matemática fundamental. Sem exceções.

## 🛠️ QUICK COMMANDS & TOOLING
> **LOCAL ENVIRONMENT CONSTRAINT & PORTABILITY:** This repository is operated on Windows 11 without Ubuntu/WSL. Avoid Unix syntax (like `rm -rf` or POSIX redirects) and run all commands natively or via the portable command utility `node scripts/run_portable_command.mjs "<command>"`.
> To validate Svelte 5 syntax correctness and block legacy Svelte 4 code (like `export let` or `$:`) that Flash models tend to hallucinate, run `node scripts/validate_svelte_syntax.mjs src`.

| Action | Command | Purpose |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Test** | `npm run test:unit` | Run Vitest suite (100% coverage required on 58 registered files) |
| **Lint** | `npm run lint` | Verify architectural constraints (Biome) |
| **Svelte 5** | `node scripts/validate_svelte_syntax.mjs src` | Verify Svelte 5 runes syntax compliance |
| **Portable** | `node scripts/run_portable_command.mjs "<cmd>"` | Translate and run Unix commands on Windows |
| **DB** | `npm run db:generate` | Generate Drizzle migrations |
| **Scaffold** | `npm run scaffold:catalog-entity` | Generate new entity with schema/service/repo/spec |
| **Scaffold** | `npm run scaffold:domain-service` | Generate new domain service with interface/fake/spec |
| **Quality Gate** | `npm run quality:gate` | Full quality gate: lint + test + coverage + Svelte validation |
| **Maintenance** | `python scripts/pandorha_process_automation.py snapshot --reason manual` | Record zero-token project state and maintenance checkpoints |
| **Hooks** | `node scripts/install_process_hooks.mjs` | Install custom Node.js git hooks (post-commit, post-merge) |

## 📜 TIER 1: ARCHITECTURE & CONSTITUTION [REF:TIER1]
- [sdd.md](./docs/architecture/sdd.md): System Architecture v2.0 — Vite SPA, Custom RPC bridge (NOT Comlink), FSD 4 layers.
- [blueprint.md](./docs/architecture/blueprint.md): Master Data Schema & Reactivity Graph.
- [core-conventions.md](./docs/conventions/core-conventions.md): v2.0.0 — Named exports, Tailwind tokens, $state rules, Pure DI, Repository pattern.
- [windows-powershell-policy.md](./docs/conventions/windows-powershell-policy.md): Rules for local terminal execution on Windows 11.
- [build-test-verify skill](./.agents/skills/build-test-verify/skill.md): Execution laws and QA gates.
- [gdd.md](./docs/architecture/gdd.md): Game Design Document.
- [feature_state_machines.md](./docs/architecture/feature_state_machines.md): Feature state machines — TurnFSM, DamagePipeline, SpellCastBuilder, Social Combat.
- [worker_rpc_spec.md](./docs/architecture/worker_rpc_spec.md): Worker RPC contract — CQRS, Result monad, serialization rules. Schema path: `src/shared/rpc/model/rpcSchemas.ts`.
- [automation-spec.md](./docs/process/automation-spec.md): Zero-token maintenance, task ledger, inbox, and promotion protocol.
- [task-ledger.md](./docs/process/task-ledger.md): Active, completed, unfinished, and snapshot records.
- [change-inbox.md](./docs/process/change-inbox.md): Unplanned requests awaiting documentation promotion (currently empty — all promoted 2026-05-31).
- **CONSOLIDATED (Phase 3):** Traps (TrapService), Illnesses & Toxins (SurvivalService), Dialogue & Choice events (LoreService), Factions favors/patronage (PatronageService), and Siege/Invasion loop (SiegeService).

## 📐 TIER 1B: ARCHITECTURAL DECISIONS [REF:ADR]
- [ADR-001](./docs/adr/ADR-001-worker-rpc-sem-comlink.md): Custom RPC bridge instead of Comlink.
- [ADR-002](./docs/adr/ADR-002-fsd-4-camadas.md): FSD with 4 layers — no pages/ or widgets/.
- [ADR-003](./docs/adr/ADR-003-vite-sem-sveltekit.md): Vite pure SPA instead of SvelteKit.
- [ADR-004](./docs/adr/ADR-004-sqlite-wasm-opfs.md): SQLite WASM + OPFS in dedicated Web Worker.
- [ADR-005](./docs/adr/ADR-005-result-pattern.md): Result Pattern mandatory — throw prohibited.
- [ADR-006](./docs/adr/ADR-006-decorator-pattern-mecanicas.md): Decorator Pattern for all game mechanics modifiers.
- [ADR-007](./docs/adr/ADR-007-hexcrawl-driven-time-flow.md): Fluxo de tempo centralizado no hexcrawl — 1 movimento = 1 Turno de Exploração; 4 turnos = 1 Dia de Aventura.
- [ADR-008](./docs/adr/ADR-008-hybrid-quest-system.md): Sistema híbrido de missões — Campaign Quests (narrativas) + Guild Contracts (recursos/downtime).
- [ADR-009](./docs/adr/ADR-009-combat-hexcrawl-transition.md): Transição mapa↔combate via estado reativo em `active_sessions` — anti-save-scumming.
- [ADR-010](./docs/adr/ADR-010-tactical-ai-combat.md): IA tática de inimigos baseada em Papéis Táticos e prioridades na ActionQueue.
- [ADR-011](./docs/adr/ADR-011-combat-loot-persistence.md): Loots de combate persistidos atomicamente no SQLite ao término do encontro.
- [ADR-012](./docs/adr/ADR-012-mercenary-dispatch-time.md): Despacho de mercenários consome ticks de exploração reais, não timers artificiais.
- [ADR-013](./docs/adr/ADR-013-reactive-weather-march.md): Climatologia reativa controlada por Progress Clock regional — penalidades de marcha e abrigo.
- [ADR-014](./docs/adr/ADR-014-rpc-cache-main-thread.md): RPC Cache global na thread principal — latência < 16ms, invalidação pessimista por escrita.
- [ADR-015](./docs/adr/ADR-015-advanced-testing-fase2.md): Diretrizes para testes de integração robustos, cobertura rigorosa de repositories e fakes em memória.
- [ADR-016](./docs/adr/ADR-016-siege-event-resolution-loop.md): Loop de resolução de cerco no Bastião desacoplado por interfaces locais (FSD compliance).

## 🧱 TIER 2: SKILLS & AGENTS [REF:TIER2]
- [.agents/skills/](./.agents/skills/): Directory containing all skill definitions for AI agents (32+ skills).
- [svelte-runes-validator](./.agents/skills/svelte-runes-validator/SKILL.md): Static syntax validator for Svelte 5 Runes.
- [pandorha-maintenance](./.agents/skills/pandorha-maintenance/SKILL.md): Automation-first maintenance workflow for checkpoints and documentation promotion.
- [build-test-verify](./.agents/skills/build-test-verify/skill.md): QA gate protocol with reverse TDD and 100% coverage.
- [core-conventions](./.agents/skills/core-conventions/SKILL.md): Enforces FSD, Svelte 5, TypeScript strict, Result Pattern.

## 🏰 TIER 3: REFERENCE DEEP DIVE [REF:TIER3]
### System Rules
- [rpg-rules-manifest.json](./docs/system/rpg-rules-manifest.json): v2.0 — JSON schema of math formulas covering dice, combat, damage, magic, logistics, social, progression.
- [game-rules.ts](./src/shared/game-rules.ts): **Source of truth in code** — `PANDORHA_RULES` constant, all game math values.
- [docs/system/magic/](./docs/system/magic/): 15 files — magic codex, spell circles 0-10, 40 metamagics, hybrid magic.
- [docs/system/combat/](./docs/system/combat/): 15 files — combat codex, immunities, monster compendiums tier 1-4, damage treatise, monster creation guide.
- [docs/system/survival/](./docs/system/survival/): **68 files** — fundamental mechanics, 6 ancestries, 4 classes, economy, crafting, exploration, traps, companions, synergy, espionage, mercenary, bastion, camp, illness, fame, investigation, hexcrawl, social combat, negotiation, weight/carry, and more. Includes 883KB compiled system document.

### Lore & Worldbuilding
- [lore/](./lore/): World lore by region (morden, dungard, floresta-ecos, gorbax, almar, cinar, draskar, o-mundo-de-pandorha).

### Architecture Coverage
- [feature-coverage-map.md](./docs/architecture/feature-coverage-map.md): Current implementation status of all 25 entities + 27 features vs documentation.

## 🛡️ SECURITY & SAFETY PROTOCOLS
- Prioritize system integrity and player safety in all implementations.
- Consult GDD and `src/shared/game-rules.ts` for math validation.
- Use strict TDD for all changes — 100% coverage on registered service files.
- Ensure all AI agents follow core conventions and build-test-verify protocols.
- NEVER use `throw new Error()` in service methods — use `ok()` / `fail()` from `src/shared/lib/result.ts`.
- NEVER import Comlink — the project uses a custom RPC bridge.
- NEVER create `+page.svelte`, `+layout.ts` or any SvelteKit file — the project uses Vite pure SPA.
